title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at CMC Vellore

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at CMC Vellore
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
